sections.markdown:
- Activity: Sun Torture Run
- Started: 2025-06-29 11:16
- Distance: 14.7 km
- Moving time: 1:20:32
- Elapsed time: 1:20:35
- Elevation gain: 102.6 m
- Average heart rate: 168.9 bpm
- Max heart rate: 183 bpm
- Average watts: 208.4 W
- Average speed: 11 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `6` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `170.2 bpm`, ranging from `153.3` to `177.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `164.5 bpm` and second-half average HR was `176.0 bpm` (+11.5 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `172.3 spm`, with a working range of `150.0` to `179.6 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `171.1 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `173.2 spm` (+2.1 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:28 /km` across `14.729 km` in `1:20:32` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:32 /km` and second-half pace was `5:24 /km` (-7 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `168.9 bpm` average and `183 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `164.7 bpm` in the first half and `174.1 bpm` in the second (+9.4 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `1:20:32` out of `1:20:35` elapsed (99.9%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `6` stop segments and `0.6%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `139.0 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `3.4 m` and `19.6 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `65.0 m` in the first half and `74.0 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
